violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermos label (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment shall sanitize in 3-bay sink until dishwasher is serviced and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Application provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Coolatte mixed was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Proper hand sink use discussed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizer buckets were (100) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. PIC changed sanitizer and tested to 300 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The following items: -Hand sink knob for cold water was observed leaking. -Oasis frozen coffee machine was observed in poor repair. Per interview PIC there is a work order for this equipment. located across from the coffee station. All Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice scoop holster have an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

An employees' beverage container (not spill proof) was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The hand washing sink was observed being used as a dump sink. Hand washing sinks may not be used to other purposes except hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was taken out of service at time of inspection. All equipment will be taken to nearby establishment (under same ownership) to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

A large stirring spoon is stored on an unclean surface (underneath coffee machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in a manner that protects the food/lip contact surfaces. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The following In-Use Utensils were observed to be stored improperly... - A large stirring spoon was observed stored on an unclean surface (counter under equipment/machine) between uses. - The scoop used for dry ingredients (sugar) was observed with the handle touching the food. In-Use utensils used for dry ingredients are to be stored with the handle above the food. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

Single-Use-Utensils were observed stored with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The Cold Water Control to the hand sink was observed to be in poor repair (Leaking when turned on for use). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
